objective: Plan owner-resolved mechanism coverage and native-agent/MCP equivalence at the same policy enforcement and final-invoker boundary.
falsifiable_claim: The declared coding agent and MCP server converge on the same PEP and final invoker, allow once, and make every selected refusal reach zero calls with exported mechanism-bound coverage facts.
dependencies: Canonical owner resolution for the coverage artifact
exit_criteria: The declared coding agent and MCP server converge on the same PEP and final invoker and the allow path invokes exactly once.
Every selected refusal reaches zero calls; mechanism-bound coverage facts and uncovered seams export honestly.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M9_AUTHORITY_GATEWAY_EQUIVALENCE_AND_COVERAGE_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Bypass, misroute, or substitute native/MCP transport, tool contract, gateway profile, local grant, resource, effect, result, delta, coverage mechanism, and uncovered-seam declarations.
remaining_nonclaims: No universal interception, opaque-runtime, endpoint-wide, or ownerless-contract claim.
The coverage declaration is non-authoritative workflow evidence until canon assigns its owner.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
